meaning: adj.超音速的,超声的n.超声波
examples: One of the designers said, "Now the ultrasonic sensor on the glove is quite large."
Picture shows how the glove with an ultrasonic sensor works according to the passage.
The bat emits these ultrasonic pulses, very high pitch sound waves that we cannot hear.
Ultrasonic detectors provide more accurate mapping of the surroundings at short range, for example when parking.
With all my money I got for Christmas I bought the Ninjago kit of the Ultrasonic Raider.
